zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：弱势震荡偏空格局
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD维持窄幅震荡，价格在79.9附近运行，仍低于20日均线81.16，短线结构偏弱，反弹持续性不足，多头缺乏突破动能

MACD指标维持负值-0.47附近，动能柱偏空，未出现明显金叉信号，RSI暂缺但结合价格表现，市场情绪偏谨慎，空头动能略占优势

下方支撑关注79.6与79.3区间，若跌破或下探78.8；上方阻力在81.1均线及82整数关口，突破需放量配合确认趋势反转

操作建议以区间思路为主，未突破81.1前谨慎追多，可在支撑附近轻仓试多，跌破79.3则需止损并等待新一轮方向确认

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana (SOL/USD) is currently in a narrow consolidation phase around 79.92, with price action tightly compressed between 79.68 and 79.95 over the last 24 hours. The broader short-term trend leans mildly bearish as price remains below the 20-day simple moving average at 81.16. This positioning suggests sellers still have slight control, though volatility is contracting, indicating a potential breakout setup forming.

Momentum indicators reinforce a cautious outlook. The MACD reading at -0.472 indicates persistent bearish momentum, although the lack of a clear signal line value suggests weakening directional conviction. Price stability near the lower boundary of its micro-range implies equilibrium between buyers and sellers. Without RSI data, momentum bias is inferred from price structure, which remains slightly pressured below key dynamic resistance.

Immediate support is established near 79.60, with a secondary floor around 79.50; a break below could expose 78.80 as the next downside target. On the upside, initial resistance sits at the 81.16 SMA(20), a key level that must be reclaimed to shift sentiment. Beyond that, 82.50 acts as a stronger resistance zone aligned with prior rejection areas and potential supply pressure.

Trading conditions favor range-bound strategies until a decisive breakout occurs. Traders may consider buying near support with tight stops below 79.50, or selling into resistance near 81.16 while momentum remains subdued. A sustained move above 81.16 would signal bullish recovery potential, while a breakdown under 79.50 could accelerate bearish continuation. Risk management remains essential given the current low-volatility compression phase.
